allow: Bash(mkdir -p api types store hooks components/layout components/auth components/shared pages/auth pages/admin pages/teacher pages/student routes)
Bash(sqlcmd -S "\(localdb\)\\MSSQLLocalDB" -Q "SELECT name FROM sys.databases WHERE name = 'QuizAppDb'")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Login: OK | Role: {d[\\"role\\"]} | User: {d[\\"fullName\\"]}'\)")
Bash("/c/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -p12345 -e "SELECT 'OK' as status;")
Bash("/c/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -p12345 -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS QuizAppDb CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;")

Bash("/c/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -p12345 QuizAppDb -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as users FROM AspNetUsers; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as quizzes FROM Quizzes; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as questions FROM Questions;")
Bash("/c/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -p12345 QuizAppDb -e "SELECT Id, Title, Mode, StartMode, JoinWindowMinutes, ManualStartedAt FROM Quizzes WHERE Mode = 1;")

Bash("/c/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -p12345 QuizAppDb -e "UPDATE QuizAttempts SET Status = 2, CompletedAt = UTC_TIMESTAMP\(\), Score = 0 WHERE Status = 0 AND TIMESTAMPDIFF\(MINUTE, StartedAt, UTC_TIMESTAMP\(\)\) > TimeLimitMinutes; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS cleaned FROM QuizAttempts WHERE Status = 2 AND Score = 0;")

Bash("/c/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -p12345 QuizAppDb -e "DELETE aa FROM AttemptAnswers aa INNER JOIN QuizAttempts qa ON aa.QuizAttemptId = qa.Id WHERE qa.Status = 0; DELETE FROM QuizAttempts WHERE Status = 0; SELECT 'Cleaned up' AS done;")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-NetFirewallRule -DisplayName '*QuizApp*' | Select-Object DisplayName, Enabled, Direction, Action | Format-Table")
